name: Slop Hauler

abilities.name: Hitch a Ride
abilities.text: After an ally within 2" declares the Walk action, this model may place itself into base contact with the ally after the action is resolved.

abilities.name: Slippery with Slop
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to move up to 3" and gain a Glutted token.

actions.name: Tossed Slop
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, the target gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Heavenly Aroma
triggers.text: Allies within (aura)2" of the target heal 2.

triggers.name: Spread It Around
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target gain an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Draw Their Attention
triggers.text: A friendly model in this model's LoS may discard a card to declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Feed the Piggies
actions.effects: Target heals 2. Then, the target gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Purification
triggers.text: Remove a token from the target.

extraction_notes: Health bar shows numbered pips from 0 to 7, confirming health value of 7
Characteristics shows 'Minion (2)' indicating model limit of 2
